mapper.select: select id, pipeline_definition_id, step_code, step_name, stage_code, step_order, impl_code, step_params, timeout_seconds, retry_policy, retry_max_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at from batch.pipeline_step_definition where pipeline_definition_id = #{pipelineDefinitionId} order by step_order
mapper.insert: insert into batch.pipeline_step_definition ( pipeline_definition_id, step_code, step_name, stage_code, step_order, impl_code, step_params, timeout_seconds, retry_policy, retry_max_count, enabled ) values ( #{pipeline_definition_id}, #{step_code}, #{step_name}, #{stage_code}, #{step_order}, #{impl_code}, #{step_params}::jsonb, #{timeout_seconds}0, #{retry_policy}'NONE', #{retry_max_count}0, #{enabled}true )

insert into batch.pipeline_step_definition ( pipeline_definition_id, step_code, step_name, stage_code, step_order, impl_code, step_params, timeout_seconds, retry_policy, retry_max_count, enabled ) values
( #{row.pipeline_definition_id}, #{row.step_code}, #{row.step_name}, #{row.stage_code}, #{row.step_order}, #{row.impl_code}, #{row.step_params}::jsonb, #{row.timeout_seconds}0, #{row.retry_policy}'NONE', #{row.retry_max_count}0, #{row.enabled}true )
